query:
UPDATE games 
SET modelTotal = bookTotal
WHERE bookTotal IS NOT NULL 
  AND bookTotal != ''
  AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL
  AND modelTotal != ''
  AND ABS(CAST(modelTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(bookTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2))) > 0.01;

  AND modelTotal != ''
  AND ABS(CAST(modelTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(bookTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2))) > 0.01;
